# PHIL.106 ? Opportunity Cost Awareness

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** opportunity_cost_awareness
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Consider what you're giving up by choosing one path over another

## Application
Identify alternatives, compare true costs including forgone opportunities, choose highest value option

## Tags
philosophy, decision-making, opportunity-cost-awareness
